name: Location
description: Information about the physical location of a restaurant.

address1.description: The first line of the street address of the restaurant.

address2.description: The second line of the street address of the restaurant.

city.description: The city or town of the restaurant. restaurant.

stateCode.description:
Deprecated. Get the state or province of a restaurant in the
`administrativeArea` value.

The abbreviation of the state or province of the restaurant.

administrativeArea.description:
The name of the geographical division (for example, state, province,
or county) that the restaurant is located in.

zipCode.description: The ZIP or postal code of the restaurant.

phoneCountryCode.description:
A numeric code corresponding to one or more countries,
used as a telephone number prefix when making 
international telephone calls.

latitude.description: The north/south geographic coordinate of the restaurant, in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The east/west geographic coordinate of the restaurant, in decimal degrees.
